ham.subject: Your Flight Itinerary Confirmation – Flight 9876
ham.body:
Dear Mr. John Doe,

Thank you for booking with SkyHigh Airlines. Here are your flight details:

- Flight: SH9876
- Date: 15 April 2026
- Departure: 10:45 AM, JFK International Airport (New York, USA)
- Arrival: 2:30 PM, LHR Heathrow Airport (London, UK)
- Gate: B12
- Seat: 12A (Window)

Baggage allowance: 1 checked bag (23 kg) and 1 carry‑on (7 kg).

Please arrive at the airport at least 3 hours before departure. For any changes or to add special services, visit <URL>.

Thank you for choosing SkyHigh.

Best regards,
SkyHigh Airlines Reservations

spam.subject: URGENT: Immediate Action Required – Wallet Suspension Notice
spam.body:
Dear CryptoUser,

We regret to inform you that your wallet address 0xABCDEF123456 has been temporarily suspended due to multiple suspicious transactions detected in the last 48 hours. To reactivate your wallet and secure your funds, please verify your identity by clicking the link below within 24 hours.

<URL>

Failure to comply will result in permanent lockout and potential loss of access to your assets.

If you believe this is a mistake, contact our support immediately.

Thank you for your prompt attention.

Sincerely,
CryptoSecure Support Team
